import React from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const RichTextEditor=_ref=>{let{value,onChange,placeholder}=_ref;const insertFormatting=format=>{const textarea=document.getElementById('proposal-content');if(!textarea)return;const start=textarea.selectionStart;const end=textarea.selectionEnd;const text=value;let newText=text;let selectedText=text.substring(start,end);switch(format){case'bold':newText=text.substring(0,start)+'**'+selectedText+'**'+text.substring(end);break;case'italic':newText=text.substring(0,start)+'_'+selectedText+'_'+text.substring(end);break;case'heading':newText=text.substring(0,start)+'
